success_criteria: no critical user errors triggered by autonomous actions
no repeated confusion reports about what the system did or why
at least one actionable improvement identified if any friction is observed

open_items.description: Assess whether the initial autonomy behavior produced any user-visible friction or confusion during the first pilot interval, and capture one specific adjustment to improve clarity or safety.

response: Initialized first tiny autonomy pilot. I’ve created one concrete follow-up item and scheduled a single wake to resolve it.

schedule_requests.purpose: Review telemetry and any user feedback from the first tiny live autonomy pilot, resolve open item followup-1 by determining whether there was user-visible friction or confusion, and propose exactly one concrete adjustment if needed.
